text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming shopping with me.<n>I needed
a lot of items, so your help was<n>much
appreciated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I could help! By the way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You know that dog cafe we passed<n>today? Would
you like to go there<n>together someday?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Th-that's fine with me, but... why do you<n>ask?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Well, you slowed down as we<n>walked past it,
so I thought maybe you<n>were interested...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You know, I love dogs too! Big ones,<n>small
ones—they're all cute! Don't you<n>think?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm... yes, I suppose. Yes. They're very<n>cute
indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm sorry, was my invite a little too<n>
imposing?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I was thinking that I'd like to learn<n>from your
candidness, Dober.
